I have watched that superbowl 37 times in the last 3 months.It was the best day of my life. And this projector is well worth the money.

review_title: Simply a great projector and worth buying it
review_body: I am simply amazed with this product how well it performs. The most i liked about this product is easy to install. Just took 5 minutes from opening to operating. It works with wifi and price is very affordable. I am enjoying watching shows on this projector. Easy to move and setup in any room also you can carry it with you if you want to on a trip.

This took almost no time to set up, its simple small and portable. I tested it on the floor and after verifying the important stuff worked, I took the mounting base off and screwed it to the ceiling with a single screw and washer. Its now installed and working great. I'm surprised at the quality of the image, it's very clear. The auto-keystone function straightened the image out instantly. With WiFi, Android OS and a remote controller, its a fine standalone entertainment projector. I have not tried casting, nor the USB or HDMI functions, but the streaming is fast and smooth. The only minor complaint is the brightness of the image. Its definitely not bright enough for use in a well lit room, but it works well in a dim room and it's great in the dark. Sound quality is good, it's not loud, but it's crystal clear. Besides, that's what Bluetooth is for. Overall, this is a good, easy to use projector .

NOT 1080 as advertised. The native resolution of this unit is 720. That means the element within the projector that creates the display is 1280 x 720. It supports 1080, which means you can put 1080 video into it, but it will be scaled down. There is no internal battery. This must be plugged in with the included adapter. Actual power connector on the unit is a weird 4 pin port, with a 3 prong electrical plug. Back panel has a single full size HDMI port, and a USB-A port for connections. If a USB drive is connected, or an HDMI cable is inserted, the unit base will not be able to rotate completely, as it will hit the USB drive or cable. The underside of the base does include a 1/4" mounting thread so it can be mounted on a tripod. Focus ring works well and it does produce a sharp image. Menus are straight forward, and clean looking. Shortest distance I was able to get it in focus was about 40". The unit is light weight and easy to use. I bought this for Halloween projection mapping, and it works just fine. If you want to watch movies while camping, you'll need an external power source, like a solar generator. I don't believe this can be powered by USB, but I didn't test it. To turn on or off, press and hold the power button on the back end for about 3 seconds. Sound isn't bad, but not great. Internal fan is kinda loud which will drown out soft or quiet movies. NO external audio port. You can connect to Bluetooth speakers and the volume control will affect the Bluetooth level. There IS a delay in the audio. The audio is about half a second behind the video. Lip sync is noticeably off. If the connection is lost, the unit will revert back to internal speaker, after about 5-10 seconds. Extra bonus, this comes with (I think 7 different) stars and galaxy projections to shine on your ceiling, however, the frame rate is poor on these videos. Playback (of these star videos) are choppy. Video playback of external content is smooth. I took off 1 star because this is advertised as 1080, and it is not.

review_body: Good value for the money! It's small compact and works really well in a dark room, would not recommend the use in a bright setting. Also I would recommend you get a Bluetooth speaker as I did, this gives a realistic sound production.
Again bought this item came on twice and would not work afterwards. When it did come on it worked great. Again if the company sends me a fully functioning device I will gladly change my review

for the cost I am thrilled with this device. It has a ton of connectivity options and is super easy to operate. wish I had bought two ... great item.. works great.. picture is agreeable for the price and I could not be more pleased.

i love just about everything about this little projector its got a great image. Good quality, small compact. Only thing I don't like about it is the speaker. The speaker in it is not good of quality. Bad speaker?
I received a replacement of this and it too did not work with the remote it came with. Nothing connects to the ports just the Home Screen. And 3 buttons that work on both projectors.

review_title: wish it had better sound quality
review_body: The easy setup and picture quality of this projector is top tier. However, the sound quality knocked 2 stars off this review. I ended up returning it because even with a bluetooth speaker, the lack of sound quality just wasnt worth it.

I love everything about this projector except for the remote controller, the remote doesn't work instantly every time, sometimes you have to hit the button multiple times before it does what you want it to do!

Very disappointed with this projector. It shuts down every 20–25 minutes, so you can't watch anything continuously. The remote is also very unresponsive and hard to use. Worst purchase I've made—definitely not worth the money. Not recommended
The picture is very blue and the shadows are too dark. The remote has a very slow response nearly unusable. The fan run all the time and the plug gets very hot.

WAKE UP AMERICA…. Scam of the year Walmart tells you this is a $400 ballpark projector and your getting an incredible Black Friday deal… It's not $41 on sale its $41 everywhere all the time .. fake product price ….scam

I'm not very tech savvy so when I say this was super easy to set up, it really IS. The quality is awesome %26 while it already has a speaker on it, you can pair it with an external speaker. So glad I got this
Works perfectly, screen mirroring works very well. Able to connect Bluetooth devices easily. Great for students who want to do presentations on them and woke good in light or dark environments
It was a great price, so I took a chance. and WOW. Super easy to use and better picture than I expected. we use it outside in the backyard and camping.

This is great for the price. Everything looks great and it is fairly easy to use. The remote control is the most frustrating part. Very slow and half the time it doesn't work. I will be looking for a new remote..

The image quality is really good, the system includes some apps pre installed, and you can use Play Store to download some others. The reason I'm not giving a higher review is because of the sound quality: the integrated speaker is bad, and the audio output level is really low, even connected with an AUX or using Bluetooth. Otherwise, nice deal!

I absolutely love this projector. It looks like I'm watching an actual TV. That's how good the quality is. I am a TV fanatic and if I say that this looks like TV quality, baby, you can best believe that it is so excited when my grandkids came over and was watching a movie on the entire wall. You really did y'all big one with this one.

It doesn't have Apple TV in the App Store, so you can't watch any of your Apple TV movies, even with screen mirroring or HDMI because Apple Hard codes their Apple TV that you cannot stream them through a cord or with mirroring. So I was able to mirror the screen of my laptop and my phone right up until the movie started playing and then it just shows black. Also, this screen definitely looks like it's 720 P resolution or lower. Power cord is 3 feet long and so it's very difficult to situate correctly in the room. It doesn't use a normal USB charger, but an odd three prong charger that doesn't fit any other appliance in my house. And the instructions say that you can charge it, but this is not a chargeable model.

The picture quality is as advertised, very good. The remote is hard to use in the dark because you cannot see the buttons so I attribute this to operator knowledge - as soon as we know where the buttons are we should be good to go without fumbling around. Compared to our larger projector this little system is hands down much better quality - to I mention the picture quality is 'VERY GOOD!" We have a little texture on our walls and ceiling; picture was still really good. Looking forward to taking this camping with the grandchildren.

I was initially impressed when the projector arrived on time. Once plugged in, the image quality was outstanding. However, the projector was shipped without a remote, making the setup impossible. So, this was incredibly disappointing, especially given an otherwise excellent product.
It is blurry and unable to adjust any settings. Terrible product

review_title: busted after not even two weeks
review_body: i can no longer connect to wifi and the bluetooth function won't allow me to mirror my phone or anything else to it. now i'm just sitting here with a hunk of garbage worth maybe $30 at MOST (if it worked)

this has been a really good purchase for movie nights with the kids..simple to use, plug and play... project it unto the ceiling, grab some pillows, blankets and snuggle down and watch. love this purchase!!

review_title: Nice price does not equal feasible.
review_body: The device was extremely hot after 2 hours, so I could not use it for long-term viewing. Even with a fan placed on it for displaying, it was still extremely hot, and I feared it a fire hazard, if left on and/or unmonitored.

review_title: Great little projector – perfect for kids!
review_body: I bought this mini projector for my kids' bedroom and I'm really impressed. The picture quality is sharp and colorful, especially in a dim room. It's small, quiet, and super easy to set up—just plug it in and it's ready to go. The built-in speaker is good enough for their room, but we sometimes connect a Bluetooth speaker for louder sound. My kids love watching cartoons and movies on the wall—it feels like a mini theater! For the price, it's a great value. It works better than I expected and has made bedtime more fun. Highly recommend if you're looking for an affordable and fun projector for kids.

Worked great for a week. Picture quality looked more like 720p. Not a big problem for me. But the HDMI stopped connecting. Then using the Netflix app built in worked great the first time. I was able to watch an entire movie. Now it shuts completely off after 15-20 Minutes.

DO NOT BUY UNLESS YOU PLAN TO USE A FIRE STICK %26 A BLUETOOTH SPEAKER! My google Pixel cell phone can not cast anything to this projector! I followed the instructions and tried many different ways through bluetooth or through wifi through different apps but I can not connect at all using my phone. I got the the projector to connect to my wifi just fine so I tried loging into my youtube account on the youtube app that comes with the projector. I can watch regular youtube videos that way but I can not open any movie that I have rented or purchased on youtube(google). Luckily I have a spare firestick that I plugged into the projector that allows me to watch my movies on youtube or through any of my streaming services. Thankfully the projector does connect to my bluetooth speaker. The projector speaker is pretty quiet and the sound quality is really horrible. The quality of the picture is decent, but not amazing, as expected for the price. I did not try connecting through HDMI to my laptop but that may work as well.

Main reason for purchase was to be able to use with my iPhone. Instructions state you can Mirror your iPhone screen but this does not work. i was able to eventually download Prime to watch some movies, but this has been an extreme let down. The only feature I bought it for does not work and you cannot contact the company.

I got this on sale to watch occasionally with the kids. It won't replace my main projector, but I am amazed at how good it looks, especially considering the price! Very clear! It's even visible with ambient light. For a projector of this size %26 price, you can't go wrong!
very hard to use and connect your apps. the screen keeps default to use certain selection and its annoying.
It has a very good picture for the price the only thing I recommend is pairing with a speaker or sound bar for the full effect.
Do not buy this it's hard to adjust, there's no 4k it looks worse then my phone and all of this just for it to glitch
Great projector for the price. picture is not very bright as to be expected. not a complaint just a fact. love it!
